offerUriWithToken.description: The offer URI with the embedded token.

PatchIntent.description: The intent for a patch operation.

SaasProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the SaaS resource.

SaasResource.description: SaaS ARM tracked resource for GA API version 2026-04-01. Inherits standard ARM envelope (id, name, type, location, tags, systemData).

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

SaasResourceListResult.description: The response of a SaasResource list operation.

value.description: The SaasResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

SaasResourceProperties.description: SaaS resource properties for GA API version 2026-04-01.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last provisioning operation performed on the resource.

assetId.description: The SaaS asset id. Server-assigned unique identifier for the marketplace subscription.

description.description: Optional description. Used as subscription display name by Teams, Admin Center and other consumers.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status. Server-assigned.

publisherName.description: The publisher name. Server-resolved from ProductCode.

planName.description: The plan name. Server-resolved from ProductCode.

offerName.description: The offer name. Server-resolved from ProductCode.

termUnit.description: The term unit (ISO 8601 duration, e.g. P1M, P1Y). Server-resolved from ProductCode.

billingPeriod.description: The billing period (ISO 8601 duration). Server-resolved from ProductCode.

riskPropertyBagHeader.description: The risk property bag header (JSON format). Write-only — not returned in GET responses.

termStartDate.description: The start date of the current term. Server-calculated.

termEndDate.description: The end date of the current term. Server-calculated.

autoRenew.description: Whether the SaaS subscription will auto renew upon term end.

isFreeTrial.description: Whether the current term is a Free Trial term. Server-determined.

purchaserEmail.description:
The purchaser email. Server-derived from authenticated identity. Read-only.

Customer data (PII): NOT included in default GET responses. Returned only when
the request specifies `$expandCustomerData=true`. Callers requesting customer
data must have appropriate authorization and handle the value per GDPR requirements.

`@secret` is applied so SDK generators emit `format: password`, ensuring the value
is redacted in logs, CLI output, and diagnostic traces.

productCode.description: The product code. Primary purchase identifier for GA — used to resolve term details server-side.

intent.description: The intent for patch operations. Write-only — not returned in GET responses.

values.name: Subscribed
values.description: The subscription is active and in use

ExpandCustomerDataQueryParameter.description: When `true`, the response includes customer-data (PII) fields such as `purchaserEmail`. Defaults to `false`.
